font-size: 13px;"><b><font color="#4a90d9">Phase 1.1 — Dev / Prod Switch</font></b><br><font color="#90caf9" style="font-size:11px;">Environment config</font></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="260" x="40" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p11arrow" edge="1" parent="1" source="p11box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#4a90d9;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=none;" target="p11detail" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p11detail" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#161b22;strokeColor=#21262d;strokeWidth=1;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<font style="font-family: Courier New; font-size: 10px;" color="#8b949e">▸ .env.dev / .env.prod alongside .env.example<br>▸ PLANT_LIMIT controls harvest size per environment<br>▸ make dev / make prod Makefile targets<br>▸ Full dataset deferred until Phase 3 pipeline is stable</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="800" x="340" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l2" edge="1" parent="1" source="p11box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#30363d;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=none;dashed=1;" target="p2abox" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2abox" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1a2744;strokeColor=#4a90d9;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<font style="font-family: Courier New; font-size: 13px;"><b><font color="#4a90d9">Phase 2a — API Harvesting</font></b><br><font color="#90caf9" style="font-size:11px;">Multi-source raw data collection</font></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="260" x="40" y="440" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2aarrow" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2abox" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#4a90d9;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=none;" target="p2adetail" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2adetail" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#161b22;strokeColor=#21262d;strokeWidth=1;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<font style="font-family: Courier New; font-size: 10px;" color="#8b949e">▸ GBIF — occurrence data · GPS plant distribution<br>▸ Kew POWO — taxonomy · native ranges · synonyms<br>▸ NASA POWER — solar radiation · DLI · UV · forecast weather<br>▸ Concurrent multi-source harvester refactor<br>▸ Per-source docs: fields · meanings · known limitations</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="800" x="340" y="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l3" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2abox" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#30363d;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=none;dashed=1;" target="p2bbox" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2bbox" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1e1828;strokeColor=#7c6fd4;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<font style="font-family: Courier New; font-size: 13px;"><b><font color="#9d8fef">Phase 2b — Research Papers</font></b><br><font color="#b39ddb" style="font-size:11px;">Targeted per-plant extraction</font></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="260" x="40" y="620" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2barrow" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2bbox" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#7c6fd4;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=none;" target="p2bdetail" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2bdetail" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#161b22;strokeColor=#21262d;strokeWidth=1;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<font style="font-family: Courier New; font-size: 10px;" color="#8b949e">▸ PubMed Central + Europe PMC APIs<br>▸ Extract DLI · PPFD · photoperiod thresholds per plant<br>▸ Per-plant not bulk — depends on 2a being stable<br>▸ Store full provenance: DOI · authors · publication date<br>▸ Deferred: automated NLP full-text extraction</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="800" x="340" y="600" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l4" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2bbox" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#30363d;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=none;dashed=1;" target="p3box" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1e1e2e;strokeColor=#484860;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<font style="font-family: Courier New; font-size: 13px;"><b><font color="#a0a0c0">Phase 3 — Processing Pipeline</font></b><br><font color="#8080a0" style="font-size:11px;">Clean · calculate · predict</font></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="260" x="40" y="810" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3arrow" edge="1" parent="1" source="p3box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#484860;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=none;" target="p3detail" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3detail" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#161b22;strokeColor=#21262d;strokeWidth=1;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<font style="font-family: Courier New; font-size: 10px;" color="#8b949e">▸ C++ Data Cleaner: normalise · deduplicate · validate · flag for review<br>▸ C++ Calculator: min / max / ideal light hours per plant per location<br>▸ DLI adapted to geographic location · season · day length<br>▸ Plant stress indicators · photoperiod sensitivity · UV thresholds<br>▸ Hardcoded test user profile (location · timezone) for initial calculations<br><font color="#6e7681">▸ Target: predictive modelling via historical + week-ahead forecast weather</font></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="800" x="340" y="790" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="l5" edge="1" parent="1" source="p3box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#30363d;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=none;dashed=1;" target="p4box" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p4box" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1e1e2e;strokeColor=#484860;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<font style="font-family: Courier New; font-size: 13px;"><b><font color="#a0a0c0">Phase 4 — Production</font></b><br><font color="#8080a0" style="font-size:11px;">Scale · schedule · serve</font></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="260" x="40" y="1020" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p4arrow" edge="1" parent="1" source="p4box" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#484860;strokeWidth=1;fillColor=none;" target="p4detail" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p4detail" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#161b22;strokeColor=#21262d;strokeWidth=1;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<font style="font-family: Courier New; font-size: 10px;" color="#8b949e">▸ Task queue · automated scheduling · API layer<br>▸ Monitoring · alerting · archiving strategy<br>▸ Full dataset harvesting enabled via PLANT_LIMIT</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="800" x="340" y="1000" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="deftitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<font style="font-family: Courier New; font-size: 11px;" color="#6e7681"><b>DEFERRED DECISIONS</b></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="300" x="40" y="1160" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="defbox" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#161b22;strokeColor=#30363d;strokeWidth=1;align=left;spacingLeft=10;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<font style="font-family: Courier New; font-size: 10px;" color="#6e7681">▸ Source trust scoring — needs multiple sources before scoring variables are understood<br>▸ User profiles — only needed when calculations require location-aware personalisation<br>▸ NLP full-text paper extraction — deferred from Phase 2b, revisit when scope is clearer<br>▸ Full dataset harvesting — gated on Phase 3 stability, controlled by PLANT_LIMIT</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="1100" x="40" y="1195" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="footer" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;" value="<font style="font-family: Courier New; font-size: 9px;" color="#484860">See Roadmap.md for full detail per phase</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="600" x="300" y="1490" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

▸ DLI adapted to geographic location · season · day length
▸ Plant stress indicators · photoperiod sensitivity · UV thresholds
▸ Hardcoded test user profile (location · timezone) for initial calculations
▸ Target: predictive modelling via historical + week-ahead forecast weather

switch.text: ▸ C++ Data Cleaner: normalise · deduplicate · validate · flag for review...
